impact: This advances the PP&D lifecycle fixture plan by adding deterministic, citation-backed reactivation process data without live crawling, DevHub login, uploads, submissions, payments, or implementation-code changes.
summary: Add a minimal reactivation-only lifecycle skeleton fixture backed by the existing lifecycle source inventory evidence.
target_task: Task checkbox-19: Add a minimal reactivation-only lifecycle process skeleton fixture with required facts, required documents, user decisions, citation-backed action gates, and explicit no-live-automation notes from existing fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
